name: Proposal follow-up
body: Hi {{client_name}}, just checking in regarding the proposal we shared for {{proposal_name}}. Please let us know if you would like us to clarify anything or move to the next step.

name: Payment reminder
body: Hi {{client_name}}, a gentle reminder that the payment of {{amount}} for {{project_name}} is due on {{due_date}}. Do reach out if you need anything.

name: Task reminder
body: Hi {{assigned_person}}, your task "{{task_name}}" is due by {{due_date}}. Please update the status once done.

name: Meeting reminder
body: Hi {{client_name}}, reminder for our meeting at {{meeting_time}}. Looking forward to it!
